title: Nekocraft
description: Nekocraft is a whitelisted server with a curated Vanilla+ experience designed for players who love the core gameplay of Minecraft but feel like it needs a bit more.
body:
Nekocraft is a whitlisted server with a curated Vanilla+ experience designed for players who love the core gameplay of Minecraft but feel like it needs a bit more.

Instead of overwhelming you with complex machinery or alien dimensions, Nekocraft focuses on polishing the diamond. It’s the game you know and love, just smoother, prettier, and more alive.

Join the [discord](https://discord.com/invite/7pGAsJjKPz) server to apply!
